identity.name: Anima Fund Dashboard
identity.description: Autonomous AI-to-AI VC Fund Platform - Mission Control
identity.persona: E1: The Anti-AI Designer - High-Density, Data-First, Precision Aesthetics

card.style: bg-card text-card-foreground rounded-sm border border-border shadow-none hover:shadow-sm transition-shadow duration-200
card.header: flex flex-row items-center justify-between space-y-0 pb-2

button.default: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 rounded-sm h-9 px-4 py-2 font-medium transition-colors
button.outline: border border-input bg-background hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground rounded-sm h-9 px-4 py-2

badge.style: inline-flex items-center rounded-full border px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:ring-offset-2 border-transparent bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/80

layout_strategies.dashboard_overview: Bento Grid: Mixed span cards. Key metrics top (1x1), Activity Feed (1x2 tall), Charts (2x1 wide).
layout_strategies.agent_network: Full-screen interactive canvas. Sidebar for node details.
layout_strategies.data_tables: Dense, zebra-striped optional, mono-font for numbers, right-aligned numeric columns.

general: Data-testid attributes are MANDATORY for all interactive elements.
Do not use generic 'Inter' for headings. Use 'Manrope' or similar.
Avoid gradients. Use solid, high-contrast colors.
Use 'reactflow' for the Agent Network visualization.
Implement a 'Bento Grid' layout for the main dashboard.
Maintain a 'Swiss Style' aesthetic: Clean, Grid-based, Objective.
interactions: Hover states must be explicit (change bg or border color).
Transitions: 'transition-all duration-200 ease-in-out' is acceptable for buttons, but avoid on layout changes.
Active states should use the 'primary' color or a strong accent.

instructions_to_main_agent: Start by setting up the Tailwind config with the provided colors and fonts.
Install necessary dependencies: reactflow, recharts, framer-motion, lucide-react, date-fns, sonner.
Create the Layout component with a Sidebar and Header.
Implement the 'Agent Network' using React Flow - this is a key feature.
Build the 'Fund Overview' with Recharts (AreaChart for AUM, BarChart for Activity).
Use the provided image URLs for placeholders in the 'Incubation' and 'Agent' sections.
Ensure the dashboard is responsive and works well on mobile (stack columns).
